meta.description: SL Colonies is a flexible roleplay system for Second Life that connects survival, farming, breeding, crafting, and trading for players and world builders.

hero.headline: A Flexible Roleplay Framework for Worlds That Want More
hero.body: Immerse yourself in a captivating RPG world that blends survival, farming, breeding, crafting, and trading. SL Colonies is designed for both players and world builders who want depth, progression, and community-driven stories.
hero.imageAlt: Hero banner placeholder for SL Colonies

overview.title: What Is SL Colonies?
overview.intro: SL Colonies is an immersive and dynamic RPG system inside Second Life. It helps regions run compelling progression loops while letting communities shape their own identity.

points.title: Connected Gameplay
points.text: Survival, farming, breeding, crafting, and trading are part of one unified loop instead of disconnected mini-systems.

points.title: Built for Collaboration
points.text: The system rewards interaction between players, encouraging travel, trade, and profession-driven cooperation.

points.title: Medieval World Fantasy
points.text: Set in a rich medieval setting with room for quests, social economies, and long-form community storytelling.

players.title: For Players
players.intro: Embark on a medieval adventure where your decisions, alliances, and crafted goods shape your path.
list: Engage in quests, profession loops, and dynamic progression.
Forge alliances and join a player-driven economy.
Master crafting and combat-adjacent systems over time.
Explore diverse regions and activities with community support.

builders.title: For World Builders
builders.intro: SL Colonies gives world builders tools to craft immersive RPG environments and long-term community arcs.
list: Design structures, quest hooks, and progression landscapes.
Create region-specific identity while using shared system foundations.
Tune loops to suit your world's pace and social culture.
Collaborate with a creator-focused community to iterate faster.

economy.title: Dynamic Player-Driven Economy
economy.intro: In SL Colonies, alliances are forged, goods are traded, and adventure is tied to economic agency.

cards.title: Resource Gathering
cards.text: Gather materials that feed crafting and regional trade networks.

cards.title: Crafting Value
cards.text: Convert resources into sought-after items and profession outcomes.

cards.title: Trading Networks
cards.text: Join merchants, artisans, and traders to unlock broader prosperity loops.

team.title: The People Behind SL Colonies
team.intro: SL Colonies is built by passionate creators focused on a groundbreaking roleplay experience.

members.name: Temujin Calidius
members.bio: Leads SL Colonies with a focus on integrating the best systems and gameplay patterns from across Second Life and beyond.

members.name: Drakkhis Skaeren
members.bio: Drives technical innovation and feature depth to keep SL Colonies evolving for both builders and players.

morePages.title: Systems Docs
morePages.description: Detailed mechanics, setup guides, and module references.

morePages.title: Patch Notes
morePages.description: Chronological release notes and update breakdowns.

morePages.title: Community Stories
morePages.description: Player highlights, region showcases, and event recaps.

morePages.title: Creator Toolkit
morePages.description: Branding assets, media kit, and partnership resources.

footer.note: SL Colonies is built for Second Life communities that want flexible roleplay systems and lasting player stories.
